title: bidens molokaiensis
intro: Bidens molokaiensis, also known as Molokai bidens or Molokai sticky stem, is a species of flowering plant in the aster family (Asteraceae) that is endemic to the island of Molokai in Hawaii. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Bidens molokaiensis include the reduction of pain and inflammation, as well as the treatment of wounds and skin conditions. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in tinctures, salves, and infusions, and is believed to promote wound healing and soothe skin irritations.
